productDisplayName: Spykar Men Skinny Low Waist Tight Fit Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue tight Fit jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex that has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low waist, tight fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take causal dressing to the next level in these blue tight fit jeans from spykar. The low waisted jeans in blue are perfect for outings with friends. Team this pair with tees and canvas shoes for a great laidback look.
